# history-response direction-gap active environment

Observed locally on 2026-07-14:

```text
python==3.13.12
torch==2.12.1+cu130
transformers==5.13.0
sentence-transformers==5.6.0
numpy==2.4.3
scipy==1.17.1
scikit-learn==1.8.0
PyYAML==6.0.3
cuda_devices=4 x NVIDIA A40 (44.4 GiB each)
```

The shared validation/evaluation code uses only the standard library. E1/E2
model work additionally requires the packages above and reviewed local caches
for `BAAI/bge-reranker-v2-m3` and `Qwen/Qwen3-Reranker-0.6B`. Those model
caches were not present at the time of this manifest and must not be silently
substituted with older BGE/Qwen checkpoints.
